name: claude-code-starter-hooks
description: claude-code-starter — Hook scripts for session tracking, logging, and observability.

_comments.note: Hooks are zero-dependency by default — they use only Node.js built-in modules.
default_hooks: session-inject.mjs      — UserPromptSubmit: Extract session IDs, log prompts
log-unified.mjs         — PostToolUse: Log every tool call to actions.jsonl
skill-activated.mjs     — PreToolUse: Track which skills have been activated
session-end.mjs         — Stop: Write session summary (duration, tool count, skills)
pre-compact.mjs         — Notification: Snapshot state before auto-compact
subagent-lifecycle.mjs  — SubagentCompleted: Audit trail of subagent activity
